name: British Army Training Unit Kenya
confidence_rationale: Nyati Barracks is the well-known British Army Training Unit Kenya (BATUK) facility located in Nanyuki, Laikipia County, Kenya. The barracks sits on the eastern edge of Nanyuki town near the equator, at approximately 0°01'N, 37°04'E. BATUK has maintained a permanent presence here for decades, using the adjacent Laikipia/Nanyuki training areas and Ol Pejeta/Dol Dol ranges. Coordinates reflect the established garrison location with high confidence.
